school.motto: We Ignite Excellence in all our pupils.
school.mission: To be a leading school in the provision of quality education
school.vision: The vision of Sir Apollo Kaggwa Primary School, Kisaasi is to produce devoted learners in academics, moral education and life skills, leadership skills, creativity, and innovation, honest and humble, self-driven with a positive attitude towards quality work.

title: Sir Apollo Kaggwa Primary School Kisaasi
defaultDescription: Sir Apollo Kaggwa nursery and primary school-Kisaasi is a number one education service provider within Uganda aiming at developing a holistic child throughout the primary level.
